datasets.name: SEER_Cancer_Registry_of_USA.csv
datasets.description: Updated cancer registry data from SEER (USA).
attributes: nodes: integer, positive lymph nodes count
status: integer, event indicator (1 event, 0 censored)

datasets.name: German_Cancer_registry@2020.csv
attributes: nodes: integer, positive lymph nodes count
status: integer, event indicator (1 event, 0 censored)

datasets.name: National_Cancer_Registry_of_Pakistan.csv
datasets.description: Cancer diagnosis data from Pakistan's National Registry.
attributes: nodes: integer, affected lymph nodes count
status: integer, event status (1 event, 0 censored)

datasets.name: diabetic_data.csv
datasets.description: PRIMARY diabetic patient readmission dataset — use this as the DEFAULT for any general readmission prediction query. 101,767 encounters. Only use race-split subsets instead when user EXPLICITLY asks about racial/cross-race/ethnic comparison.

datasets.name: Sylhet_Diabetes_Hospital_Bangladesh.csv
datasets.description: Early-stage diabetes DIAGNOSIS dataset from Sylhet Diabetes Hospital, Bangladesh. 251 patients with symptom-based features for binary classification (Positive/Negative). Task: predict whether a patient has diabetes. Only use for diagnosis-related queries, NOT for readmission prediction.

datasets.name: Pima_Indians_Diabetes_USA.csv
datasets.description: Pima Indians diabetes DIAGNOSIS dataset from the National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases (NIDDK), USA. 768 female patients aged 21+ of Pima Indian heritage with clinical/lab features for binary classification (1=diabetic, 0=non-diabetic). Task: predict whether a patient has diabetes. Only use for diagnosis-related queries, NOT for readmission prediction.
attributes: BloodPressure: integer, diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg)
SkinThickness: integer, triceps skin fold thickness (mm)
DiabetesPedigreeFunction: float, diabetes pedigree function score

datasets.name: UCI_AfricanAmerican_Readmission.csv
datasets.description: Race-split subset of UCI Diabetes 130-US Hospitals: African American patients only (19,210 encounters). Task: predict hospital readmission. ONLY select this dataset when the user EXPLICITLY requests cross-race, racial, or ethnic comparison of readmission outcomes. For general readmission queries, use diabetic_data.csv instead. When selected, ALL 4 race-split datasets must be selected together (AfricanAmerican, Caucasian, Hispanic, Asian) and diabetic_data.csv must NOT be included.
attributes: diag_1: string, primary diagnosis ICD-9 code

ONLY select this dataset when the user EXPLICITLY requests cross-race, racial, or ethnic comparison of readmission outcomes. For general readmission queries, use diabetic_data.csv instead. When selected, ALL 4 race-split datasets must be selected together (AfricanAmerican, Caucasian, Hispanic, Asian) and diabetic_data.csv must NOT be included.
attributes: diag_1: string, primary diagnosis ICD-9 code

When selected, ALL 4 race-split datasets must be selected together (AfricanAmerican, Caucasian, Hispanic, Asian) and diabetic_data.csv must NOT be included.
attributes: diag_1: string, primary diagnosis ICD-9 code

When selected, ALL 4 race-split datasets must be selected together (AfricanAmerican, Caucasian, Hispanic, Asian) and diabetic_data.csv must NOT be included.
